name: Crockpot Hawaiian Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the roast on a rack and broil for 15-30 minutes, or until browned (this can be done the night before). Make sure to turn off the heat.
2. Stick the cloves randomly all over the roast.
3. Place the roast into the crockpot on the meat rack.
4. Mix together the nutmeg and paprika, then sprinkle evenly over the roast.
5. In a small bowl, stir together the catsup, orange juice, honey, soy sauce, lemon juice, and Kitchen bouquet (if using), then pour over the roast.
6. Cover and cook on LOW for 10-12 hours or on HIGH for 4-6 hours.
7. Remove the meat from the crockpot and thicken the juices by mixing together 1 1/2 teaspoons cornstarch and 2 tablespoons water in a small bowl. Whisk the mixture into the juices and return to the crockpot. Cook on HIGH until thickened.
